title: Your coach profile just got a face. And a whole lot more.
excerpt: Coaches now have real profiles with photos, families can filter by state and org, and three new tools — messaging, private lesson scheduling, and invoicing — are live. Plus: the family app is out of beta.
author: TwirlPower Team

title: How TwirlPower Works
author: TwirlPower
excerpt: A step-by-step walkthrough for families, coaches, and competition directors — everything you need to get started.

title: The Org Guide: How Baton Twirling Organizations Score, Classify, and Compete
author: TwirlPower
excerpt: Six organizations. Six scoring systems. One plain-language guide for families who are tired of figuring it out by word of mouth.

title: Director Platform beta opening soon — manage.twirlpower.com
author: TwirlPower
excerpt: The TwirlPower Director Platform is entering beta — a dedicated app for competition directors to plan, build, and run a baton twirling competition from start to finish.

title: TwirlPower is live — open beta now available
author: TwirlPower
excerpt: TwirlPower is now in open beta and free for all families, coaches, and competition directors — tracking classification, results, and advancement across USTA, NBTA, TU, and DMA.
